# frameName

**Instance Property**

The name of the frame. If the receiver does not represent the contents of an entire HTML frame, this is `nil`.

## Declaration

```swift
var frameName: String! { get }
```

## Getting attributes

- **data**: The receiver’s data.
- **url**: The receiver’s URL.
- **mimeType**: The receiver’s MIME type.
- **textEncodingName**: The receiver’s text encoding name.
title: frameName
